2606.17815.title: Beyond Native Success: Auditing Deployment-Interface Exposure of CLIP Backdoors
2606.17815.paper_summary: Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training models are widely reused across downstream interfaces, including feature extraction, retrieval, reranking, and selection. Existing CLIP backdoor, however, usually validate attacks on a small attack-native task, leaving unclear whether the same poisoned checkpoint remains exposed, weakens, or becomes not applicable when reused through other interfaces. We introduce DIFE, a Deployment-Interface Footprint Evaluation framework that audits backdoored CLIP checkpoints across deployment interfaces. DIFE makes various evaluations comparable by specifying each interface's component readout, trigger channel, target event, reference condition, and metric. DIFE also introduces effective-footprint diagnosis to identify the reusable CLIP component or component combination that carries exposure and explains where risk transfers. Auditing reproduced CLIP backdoors with DIFE reveals a structured landscape: native success is not a checkpoint-level risk certificate, exposure follows component footprints, text-side poisoning does not yield textual-encoder control, and some coupled attacks remain mechanism-bound. This audit reveals a import gapin existing CLIP backdoors: a textual encoder that itself becomes a reusable carrier of adversarial behavior. We therefore introduce BadTextTower to fill this gap. BadTextTower produces strong text-conditioned retrieval, reranking, and selection exposure while leaving visual-only reuse nearly clean.
2606.17815.paper_summary_zh: 對比語言-圖像預訓練模型在下游接口中被廣泛重用，包括特徵提取、檢索、重新排序和選擇。然而，現有的 CLIP 後門通常在一個小的攻擊原生任務上驗證攻擊，尚不清楚同一個被污染的檢查點在通過其他接口重用時是否仍然暴露、變弱或變得不適用。我們引入 DIFE，一個部署接口足跡評估框架，用於審計後門 CLIP 檢查點在部署接口中的表現。DIFE 通過指定每個接口的組件讀出、觸發通道、目標事件、參考條件和指標，使各種評估可比較。DIFE 還引入有效足跡診斷，以識別攜帶暴露的可重用 CLIP 組件或組件組合，並解釋風險轉移的地方。使用 DIFE 審計重現的 CLIP 後門揭示了一個結構化的景觀：原生成功並不是檢查點級別的風險證書，暴露遵循組件足跡，文本側的毒化不會產生文本編碼器控制，並且某些耦合攻擊仍然受機制限制。這次審計揭示了現有 CLIP 後門中的一個重要缺口：一個文本編碼器本身成為對抗行為的可重用載體。因此，我們引入 BadTextTower 來填補這個缺口。BadTextTower 產生強大的文本條件檢索、重新排序和選擇暴露，同時幾乎保持僅視覺重用的乾淨。
2606.17815.author: Kunlan Xiang et.al.
2606.17815.authors: Kunlan Xiang, Haomiao Yang, Wenbo Jiang
